arts.ttl: Sesko to Arsenal transfer latest - Do the Gunners have time to sign striker?
arts.sum: The Gunners are linked with Sporting CP forward Viktor Gyokeres, but face competition from Manchester United and from around Europe, while deals for Dusan Vlahovic and Matheus Cunha seem far away. No move materialised then, with Arteta deciding to put his faith in Gabriel Jesus and Kai Havertz to lead the line - particularly after the latter's performances at the tail end of last season where the makeshift striker managed nine goals and six assists in the closing 13 Premier League games.

arts.sum: Arsenal are the frontrunners to sign Wolverhampton Wanderers forward Matheus Cunha, who is wanted by six Premier League clubs.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Dinamo Zagreb – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal host Dinamo Zagreb in the Champions League this evening with qualification almost within reach. Mikel Arteta’s side will move up to third in the standings with a win at the Emirates and all but assure automatic entry to the last 16. The Gunners have impressed in Europe this season, conceding just twice in six […] The post Arsenal vs Dinamo Zagreb – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Latest Arsenal injury news as William Saliba hope emerges and Bukayo Saka clarity
arts.sum: Arsenal will welcome the return of two players from injury when they face Dinamo Zagreb in the Champions League. However, Arteta has confirmed that the Italy international, along with Nwaneri, has returned to training and is in contention to feature against Zagreb.

No Croatian team has ever won away from home against an English side in the European Cup or Champions League, with all four of those previous attempts being by Dinamo Zagreb. With just two friendly matches to oversee his new squad, the Italian legend will be hoping he can inspire his side to a third-straight away win in the Champions League, which has given them a chance of reaching the play-off round.
